"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const isMatch = (match, path) => { const parts = path.split("."); let part; let i = 0; let value = match; while ((part = parts[i++]) != null && value != null) { value = value[part]; } return value != null; }; exports.isMatch = isMatch; //# sourceMappingURL=Matches.cjs.map
